loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

requestment_date.text: วันที่ขอกู้

document_group.text: กลุ่มเอกสาร

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_group , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint , sc_lon_m_loan_request.real_receive , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as member_name , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.paid_amount , pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X' ) as bank_acc_no
, nvl((select sum(paid_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and other_loan_status = '1' ),0) as other_loan_amount
, nvl((select amount from sc_lon_m_req_fee where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and fee_type = decode(sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type,'12','48','47') ),0) as forward_fee_amount
, nvl((select amount from sc_lon_m_req_fee where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and fee_type = '01' ),0) as fee_amount
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , si_security_user , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.other_loan_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date = '21 พ.ค. 2024' --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '12' --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_group = '4' order by sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
